name: Pre-existing back issues worsened by work forklift accident, am I screwed?
description: Yes, covers aggravation; medical proof key.

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing back issues worsened by work forklift accident, am I screwed?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, covers aggravation; medical proof key.
acceptedAnswer.description: No, workers' comp covers aggravation; prove forklift caused flare-up.[2] Context: Insurers fight this. Key factors: Pre/post records comparison. Practical guidance: Get orthopedist opinion; attorney fights offsets. Still compensable.
